data.title: Microservices
data.description: The website utilizes microservices architecture to enhance scalability and maintainability.
data.technical_spec: Services are containerized using Docker and orchestrated with Kubernetes.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: A CDN is used to distribute content and improve load times globally.
data.technical_spec: Leveraging Akamai for content delivery and caching strategies.

data.title: Single Page Application (SPA)
data.description: Parts of the site are built as SPAs for dynamic content loading.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes React.js framework for fast navigational experience.

data.title: RESTful API
data.description: APIs follow REST principles to provide a standardized interface for web services.
data.technical_spec: Implemented with JSON data interchange format.

data.title: Edge Computing
data.description: Leverages edge computing to process data closer to the user.
data.technical_spec: Utilization of AWS Wavelength for low-latency computations.
